name: QA 840
description:
PCP QA Test No. 840

Test that pmcd advertises its presence using avahi



Copyright (c) 2013-2014 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos7-container reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 840.out.bad)
1a2
> cat: /var/log/pcp/pmproxy/pmproxy.log: No such file or directory
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
